steps.title: Match the paired em dashes
steps.content: The later em dash before that was first detected closes a parenthetical explanation of what a supernova is. The blank must open that parenthetical with a matching em dash after supernova.

steps.title: Choose matching punctuation
steps.content:
• Choice A: Opens with a comma but the sentence later closes with an em dash.
  • Choice B: Creates a sentence break that leaves the following clause awkwardly attached.
  • Choice C: Opens the explanatory interruption with an em dash paired with the later em dash.
  • Choice D: Opens with a colon but closes with an em dash.
The answer is C.
